connectionString.title: ConnectionString is the connection string for the Azure Service Bus

parameters.title:
Parameters is the list of key-value extracted from event's payload that are applied to
the trigger resource.
+optional

payload.description: Payload is the list of key-value extracted from an event payload to construct the request payload.

queueName.title: QueueName is the name of the Azure Service Bus Queue

subscriptionName.title: SubscriptionName is the name of the Azure Service Bus Topic Subscription

tls.title:
TLS configuration for the service bus client
+optional

topicName.title: TopicName is the name of the Azure Service Bus Topic
